name: Brain MRI Multiple Sclerosis Protocol
description: Dedicated brain MRI protocol for evaluation of multiple sclerosis with demyelinating plaques

findings.technique: Dedicated multiple sclerosis protocol MRI including sagittal FLAIR, axial T2, FLAIR, diffusion-weighted, and post-contrast T1 sequences through the brain.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Periventricular White Matter
sections.content: The periventricular white matter demonstrates [no T2/FLAIR hyperintense lesions / no demyelinating plaques]. No periventricular lesions identified.

sections.name: Juxtacortical White Matter
sections.content: The juxtacortical white matter demonstrates [no T2/FLAIR hyperintense lesions / no demyelinating plaques]. No juxtacortical lesions.

sections.name: Deep White Matter
sections.content: The deep white matter demonstrates [no T2/FLAIR hyperintense lesions / no deep white matter lesions]. No focal lesions.

sections.name: Infratentorial Lesions
sections.content: The cerebellum and brainstem demonstrate [no T2/FLAIR hyperintense lesions / no infratentorial lesions]. No lesions in the cerebellar peduncles or pons.

sections.name: Corpus Callosum
sections.content: The corpus callosum demonstrates [no T2/FLAIR hyperintense lesions / no callosal lesions]. The callosomarginal and pericallosal arteries are normal.

sections.name: Cortical Lesions
sections.content: The cerebral cortex demonstrates [no T2/FLAIR hyperintense lesions / no cortical lesions]. No cortical involvement.

sections.name: Gadolinium Enhancement
sections.content: Post-contrast images demonstrate [no enhancing lesions / no active demyelination / no enhancing plaques]. No blood-brain barrier disruption.

sections.name: Ventricles
sections.content: The ventricular system is [normal in size / not dilated]. No abnormal enhancement around the ventricles.

sections.name: Spinal Cord
sections.content: Although dedicated spinal cord imaging was not performed, there is no evidence of cord expansion or abnormal signal to suggest acute demyelination.

sections.name: Other Findings
sections.content: No chronic microvascular ischemic changes. No mass lesion or infection.

impression:
1. Normal brain MRI for MS evaluation.
2. No demyelinating plaques identified to suggest multiple sclerosis.
3. No active enhancing lesions to suggest acute demyelination.
author: RadReport Templates
